build.beforeDevCommand: ./scripts/setup_media_tools.sh --ensure && npm run sidecar:build && cd frontend && npm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: ./scripts/setup_media_tools.sh --ensure && npm run sidecar:build && cd frontend && npm run build

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first macOS app for video transcription and subtitle translation.
bundle.longDescription: CaptionFlow is a local-first macOS app for video transcription, subtitle merging, and optional translation. Upload files or fetch from URLs, transcribe with WhisperKit, and keep jobs and outputs on your Mac.
